location.notes: The beat covers the omens around the chasm and the party being pulled into a howling white fall while clinging to the gear they can keep.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.context: terrified woman caught in the fall
npcs.notes: She is already with the group during the storm and fall, with Jrain trying to keep hold of her.

npcs.name: Zeyfa
npcs.context: legendary power tied to the chasm
npcs.notes: Named in the prologue as the cruel west wind many in the region fear and blame for the recent portents.

organizations.name: Kemeko Monastery
organizations.notes: Its kenku monks are described as treating the chasm as refuge and sending warriors to investigate the darkness over it.

organizations.name: Vejo Vaikai
organizations.notes: Its mystics regard the chasm as a place of elemental balance and send investigators when the omens worsen.

location.context: ice platform floating in blackness beneath a false white storm
location.notes: The party awakens here, surveys the two bridges and ice-encased wolf guardians, and realizes the environment does not feel like the ordinary Great Chasm.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.context: terrified Zimkovan woman on the platform
npcs.notes: She awakens beside the party, panicked and speaking Old Zimkovan, before Finnan calms her enough to begin questioning her.

location.context: ice platform at the labyrinth's entrance
location.notes: The first phase of the fight unfolds on the floating platform between the two bridges as the wolf guardians awaken and the first wind-shade arrives.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.context: terrified woman caught beside the fight
npcs.notes: She remains on the platform while Finnan tries to keep the awakened guardian away from her.

npcs.name: ice wolf guardians
npcs.notes: The frozen wolves animate when Eolo approaches and begin the battle.

npcs.name: wind-shades
npcs.notes: The first of the wind-made shades gusts in from off the platform at the end of the beat.

location.context: ice platform under the lowering false storm
location.notes: The fight spreads across the same platform as additional wind-shades and wisps join the battle.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.notes: The shrieking shade drops her unconscious during the fighting.

npcs.name: ice wolf guardians
npcs.notes: The wolves continue pressing the party across the ice.

npcs.name: wind-shades
npcs.notes: Additional shades blow in from off the platform and attack with shrieking wind and forced movement.

npcs.name: chasm wisps
npcs.context: small ice-bright motes from the shattered wolves
npcs.notes: The first wisps appear as the wolves break apart, extinguishing light and blinding targets with icy bursts.

location.context: ice platform in the dark final phase of the fight
location.notes: The party cleans up the remaining wolf, shades, and wisps on the same platform before the danger finally passes.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.notes: Finnan revives her with healing magic while the rest of the party finishes the fight.

npcs.name: ice wolf guardians
npcs.notes: The final wolf is brought down during this phase.

npcs.name: wind-shades
npcs.notes: The last shades try to push Finnan over the edge before being destroyed.

npcs.name: chasm wisps
npcs.context: needle-ice motes buzzing around the party
npcs.notes: The remaining wisps are hunted down after the wolves and shades fall.

location.context: ice platform at the labyrinth entrance
location.notes: With the fight over, the party stays on the platform long enough for Kalima to name the place and explain why she fears being trapped here again.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.context: terrified survivor and source of information
npcs.notes: She explains that they are back in Zeyfa's Labyrinth, that no one escapes, and that the only way out lies further in.

npcs.name: Zeyfa
npcs.context: cruel west wind tied to the labyrinth
npcs.notes: Kalima identifies Zeyfa as the power whose labyrinth this is and says appeasement is demanded here.

npcs.name: the beast
npcs.notes: Kalima warns that finding the beast may be the only chance of escape.

npcs.name: Romil the Glacier King
npcs.notes: Justas identifies Romil as a high mountain Kestavo and uses his token to reassure Kalima.

items.name: Romil's token
items.notes: Justas places a blue glacial token of Romil in Kalima's hands and makes it glow.

organizations.name: Kestavo
organizations.notes: Kalima says their prayers do not reach the labyrinth, while Justas argues their power still extends here.

location.notes: The group remains on the platform, comparing what each of them knows about Kalima, the chasm, Kemeko, and the missing investigators.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.notes: Her story and escape from the labyrinth frame the party's introductions and theories.

npcs.name: Eidrikas
npcs.notes: Jrain reveals that Eidrikas vanished in the chasm with the Vejo Vaikai search party.

npcs.name: Pakrinek
npcs.context: kenku companion of the search party
npcs.notes: Jrain names Pakrinek as one of the missing companions who entered the chasm.

npcs.name: Zeyfa
npcs.notes: The party discusses how local belief connects the cruel west wind to the chasm.

organizations.name: Kemeko Monastery
organizations.notes: The kenku stronghold becomes a major point of introduction as Ekko, Eolo, and Jrain explain their ties to it.

organizations.name: Vejo Vaikai
organizations.notes: The missing mystics and Ekko's relationship to them become central to the party's understanding of why they were near the chasm.

organizations.name: Kestavo
organizations.notes: Justas explains the local small-gods tradition and how some people connect Zeyfa to it.

location.context: ice platform entrance and bridges into the maze
location.notes: The party takes stock, tests the updraft and the bridges, scouts the snow chamber ahead, and finally commits to entering the tunnels.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.context: reluctant guide at the maze entrance
npcs.notes: She explains the sacrifice to the west wind, names herself, warns that all paths lead to the beast, and agrees to come only if kept between Finnan and Justas.

npcs.name: the beast
npcs.notes: Kalima says the beast does not like waiting and that the maze's paths lead toward it.

organizations.name: Kestavo
organizations.notes: Kalima describes sacrifice and warns them not to swear by Kestavo who are not present in the labyrinth.
